footer_description: Your trusted spiritual companion — connecting devotees with sacred temples, experienced pandits and authentic Vedic rituals. Book pujas, offer chadhava and receive blessed prasad at your doorstep.
hero_s1_sub: Join live pujas performed by verified pandits at India's most revered temples — from the comfort of your home.
hero_s2_sub: Send your devotion to any temple in India. We ensure your offering reaches the deity with complete Vedic rituals.
hero_s3_sub: Get personalised guidance from certified Vedic acharyas — kundali reading, marriage matching, career horoscope & more.
hero_s4_sub: Experience the divine energy of daily aarti and darshan streamed live from Kashi Vishwanath, Tirupati, and more sacred temples.
featured_sub: Performed by verified pandits at partnered temples — ancient rituals delivered with modern care

ct_address_text: Narayan Kripa, Sector 66, Gurugram, Haryana, India
ct_faq_q1: How do I book a puja?
ct_faq_a1: Choose a puja from our catalogue, share your sankalp details, and select a date — verified pandits handle the rest.
ct_faq_a2: Yes — prasad and a blessings certificate are couriered to your registered address after the ritual.
ct_faq_a3: Every pandit on Narayan Kripa is certified by recognised Vedic institutions and reviewed by our acharya panel.
ct_faq_q4: Can I attend the puja virtually?
ct_faq_a4: Absolutely — most pujas include a live or recorded video so you can witness every step.
ct_faq_a5: Cancellations made 24 hours before the puja are fully refundable. Read full terms on our policy page.

test_1_quote: I booked the Maha Rudrabhishek for my father's health and the entire experience was transcendent. The pandits were learned, the ritual was conducted with utmost devotion, and we received the prasad within days.
test_2_quote: Narayan Kripa made it possible for me to offer chadhava at Tirupati despite living far away. Watching the live darshan brought tears to my eyes. Truly a blessing for our digital age.
test_3_quote: The kundali consultation with their pandit ji helped my family understand grah-doshas and the right remedies. We performed the Navgraha Shanti and saw real positive changes within months.
test_mini_1_quote: Beautifully conducted Satyanarayan puja. Felt the divine presence.
test_mini_2_quote: The pandits are extremely knowledgeable. Highly recommended.
test_mini_3_quote: Live darshan from Kashi feels like being there in person.
